Project summary:
- Built a premium Vite + React + TypeScript portfolio website.
- Installed Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, GSAP, Lenis, Three.js, React Three Fiber, and related UI dependencies.
- Added animated hero, about, education, skills, projects, internship, certifications, and contact sections.
- Verified the project with `npm run build`.
